violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Observed an open red bull beverage in the reach in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Observed wall in walk in cooler damaged at the time of inspection.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Observed grease build up on the flat top grill. Also on the side of the other equipment in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed ceiling in the kitchen area had loose hanging debris by the vents. The vents in the bakery area also had loose hanging debris at time of inspection.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed cappuccino dispenser has heavy powder build up.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed ice chute on Pepsi dispenser has pink slime on inside.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed single service items stored on floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed ceiling and walls of food prep area need to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
